title: Simon Property Group Announces Date For Its Fourth Quarter 2021 Earnings Release And Conference Call
text: INDIANAPOLIS, Jan. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Simon, a global leader in the ownership of premier shopping, dining, entertainment and mixed-use destinations, today announced details for its fourth quarter earnings release and conference call.  Simon's financial and operational results for the quarter ending December 31, 2021, will be released after the market close on February 7, 2022.
